name: Russell Howard
bio: Russell Howard is an English comedian and television presenter from Bath known for energetic, optimistic observational stand-up. He rose to prominence on the BBC panel show Mock the Week and created the topical comedy series Russell Howards Good News, which became BBC Threes highest-rating entertainment show. He has since fronted The Russell Howard Hour and released Netflix specials.

timeline.ev: Wins Best Compere at the Chortle Awards and is nominated for an Edinburgh Comedy Award
Russell Howards Good News begins on BBC Three
The Russell Howard Hour premieres on Sky One

accolades: Russell Howards Good News became BBC Threes highest-rating entertainment series
Best Compere at the Chortle Awards (2006)

bits.t: We Live in the Age of Idiocy
We Need To Laugh At Ourselves
